# ImgUp

> Instant image hosting with permanent shareable links. No account required.

ImgUp is a fast, free image hosting service. Upload any image and instantly receive a permanent, shareable URL. Built for developers, designers, and teams who need reliable image hosting without friction.

## Features

- Instant upload via drag-and-drop or file picker
- Permanent shareable links (no expiry)
- No account or sign-up required
- Supports JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, and SVG
- Direct image URLs for embedding anywhere

## How it works

1. Visit the homepage
2. Drop an image or click to select a file
3. Copy the generated shareable link
4. Share or embed the image anywhere

## Use cases

- Share screenshots and mockups with teammates
- Embed images in documentation, READMEs, or blog posts
- Quick image hosting for prototypes and demos
- Attach images to bug reports or support tickets

## Technical

- Built with Next.js and UploadThing
- Images served via CDN for fast global delivery
- Supports files up to 4MB

## Contact

For issues or feedback: https://imgup.app
